meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Scale Your Freelance AI Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus. Learn how to master Claude Code skills to automate complex builds and deliver high-end SaaS applications for clients.
content.answer_block: Stop manually coding repetitive boilerplate. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your workflow into an automated engine. This setup allows you to offload complex architectural tasks, debug in real-time, and ship production-ready features significantly faster, ensuring your freelance business stays competitive and highly profitable.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’re staring at a blank terminal, the client deadline is looming, and you’re stuck refactoring the same basic authentication logic for the tenth time. The gap between your current output and the elite, high-velocity builders isn't raw talent—it's the friction in your development environment that keeps you trapped in the 'beginner' cycle.

It’s time to move beyond the limitations of manual coding. By mastering Claude Code and the Antigravity framework, you turn your terminal into an intelligent partner. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about shifting your role from a keyboard-bound executor to a high-level technical architect who ships scalable, robust solutions while others are still setting up their environments.

steps.title: Initialize the Intelligent Workspace
steps.description: Configure your environment to allow Claude Code direct file-system access, ensuring the agent understands your project context immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and suggest an optimal modular architecture for a scalable SaaS application.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold your core application structure, reducing setup time from hours to seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-grade folder structure for a Next.js application with Tailwind, Prisma, and Auth0 integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold the project structure based on the provided architecture schema'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Debugging
steps.description: Inject your current error logs into the agent to resolve complex dependency conflicts without manual searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent error logs in /logs/build.log and refactor the database connection logic to resolve the memory leak.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'fix the identified dependency conflicts in package.json'

steps.title: Execute Batch Refactoring
steps.description: Apply sweeping changes across multiple files, such as migrating to a new API version or updating global styles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify all instances of deprecated API calls and refactor them to the new SDK standard across the /src directory.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor all deprecated API calls to v2.0 standards'

steps.title: Automate Documentation and Testing
steps.description: Ensure your code is professional and maintainable by auto-generating unit tests and technical documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for all new functions and update the README.md with setup instructions for the client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create test suite for core modules and update documentation'

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or sensitive environment files.
Chain your prompts: Ask Claude to plan the architecture first, then execute the scaffolding, then implement the logic.
Use 'claude status' frequently to ensure the agent has the correct context of your current working branch.
When facing a complex bug, paste the specific stack trace into the CLI to force Claude to prioritize the error source.
Leverage the Antigravity 'dry-run' mode to review proposed changes before they are committed to your codebase.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, start by porting one of your existing, messy projects into the Claude Code workflow to experience the speed difference firsthand.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with entry-level development bottlenecks and start building like a senior architect. Your clients are waiting for the quality you're capable of delivering once you master these tools. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
